close_channel.description: Applies a channel closing action to the current channel.

add_to_channel.name: add_to_channel
add_to_channel.description: Adds roles to the current channel using a filtered selector.

create_match_channel.description: Creates a match channel for a specific matchday entry.

courtesy_minutes.description: Courtesy minutes before the match starts

date.description: Match date in DD/MM/YYYY or YYYY-MM-DD format

best_of.description: Number of games in the best of X series

view_my_team.name: view_my_team
view_my_team.description: Shows your team profile based on your role and Google Sheets.

team_role.description: Team role to query. Only available to Staff, Administrador, and CEO.

add_team_to_ticket.name: add_team_to_ticket
add_team_to_ticket.description: Adds all members of a team role to the current ticket.

team_role.description: Team role whose members you want to add to the ticket.

make_signing.name: make_signing
make_signing.description: Imports signings from a linked Discord message into Google Sheets.

message_link.description: Discord message link containing the player template.

technical_staff_message_link.description: Discord message link containing the technical staff template.

remove_signing.name: remove_signing
remove_signing.description: Fully removes a member as player and technical staff from Google Sheets.

discord_name.description: Discord name of the member you want to remove completely.

remove_player_signing.name: remove_player_signing
remove_player_signing.description: Removes only a player from the Google Sheets roster.

discord_name.description: Discord name of the player you want to remove from the roster.

remove_staff_signing.name: remove_staff_signing
remove_staff_signing.description: Removes only technical staff roles from Google Sheets.

discord_name.description: Discord name of the member you want to remove from technical staff.

sync_team_role.name: assign_team_role_automatically
sync_team_role.description: Synchronizes Discord team roles from the current Google Sheets roster.

team_role.description: Team role you want to reload from Google Sheets.

sync.invalid_usage: Use `!sync guild`, `!sync global`, `!sync prune guild`, `!sync prune global`, or `!sync prune other`.
sync.scope_locked: The bot is configured with `BOT_SYNC_SCOPE={sync_scope}`. Change `.env` and restart if you want to use the other scope.

fallback.file_notice: The full profile exceeds Discord's visible message limit and is attached as a single ANSI file.

role_selection.prompt: You have multiple team roles and the bot cannot decide which one to use: {role_names}. Select the team you want to view.

channel_management.delete_prompt:
You are about to permanently delete `{channel_name}`.
Protected system roles: {protected_roles}.
Confirm only if you are completely sure.
channel_management.matchday_close_prompt:
You are about to close the matchday in `{channel_name}`.
Permissions for unprotected roles will be removed and only these roles will keep access: {protected_roles}.
Confirm only if you want to apply this closure.

channel_role_addition.no_results_placeholder: There are no roles to display
channel_role_addition.render_content:
Select the roles you want to add to this channel.
Filtered range: `{range_start}` < roles < `{range_end}`.
Page {page}/{page_count} | Selected: {selected_count} | Available: {visible_count}/{candidate_count}.
Search: {search_query}.
Use Confirm to apply the channel permissions.
channel_role_addition.only_actor: Only the user who ran the command can use this selector.
channel_role_addition.timeout: Role selection expired. No changes were applied.
channel_role_addition.select_before_confirm: Select at least one role before confirming.

channel_delete_confirmation.only_actor: Only the user who ran the command can confirm this action.
channel_delete_confirmation.timeout: Confirmation expired. The channel was not deleted.

channel_matchday_close_confirmation.only_actor: Only the user who ran the command can confirm this action.
channel_matchday_close_confirmation.timeout: Confirmation expired. The matchday was not closed.

details.title: 🔰 Important details 🔰
details.description:
- If nobody reaches an **agreement** and neither team sets a **date**, the match will be marked as **void**. Neither team will receive points for this matchday.
- Everyone should do their part to **play the match** and **organize it** as **soon as possible**.
- Try to stay **flexible on both sides**. If one team cannot play, it should **propose** another **date** and continue from there.
- There are **grace minutes** depending on the scheduled **match time**. If the match is set for **16:00**, it should start no later than **16:10**, unless both teams explicitly agree otherwise.

issues.title: 🔰 In case of issues 🔰
issues.description:
- If the match is **cancelled** **1 hour before** because the **opponent** can no longer play, it will most likely be considered a **free win**, unless the opposing team agrees to reschedule. A **Staff** member will evaluate the situation.
- Any **problem** related to the **match** should be documented with evidence:
 - Take **screenshots** of incidents.
 - Save proof of **toxic** behaviour.
 - Record any **match incident**.
- The match will be considered **finished** once a Staff member switches the channel to **read-only**. Any **appeal** must be handled by **opening a ticket**.

match_data.title: ⚽ 🚗 Match data 🚗 ⚽
match_data.description:
- Match information
 - ⌛ {courtesy_minutes} courtesy minutes
 - 🗓️ {match_date}
 - ⏰ {match_time}
 - ⚔️ {best_of_label} (best of {best_of})
- Private lobby
 - Name: `{room_name}`
 - Password: `{room_password}`

participants.team_role_empty: That team role has no valid members to add to the ticket.

team_signing.message_not_found: The linked message was not found: `{message_id}`.
team_signing.message_fetch_forbidden: The bot cannot access the linked message. Check its permissions in that channel.

team_signing.invalid_message_format: The linked message does not follow the expected signing import format: {details}.

team_signing.technical_staff_member_not_found: No technical staff role with Discord `{discord_name}` was found in Google Sheets.
team_signing.member_not_found: No player or technical staff role with Discord `{discord_name}` was found in Google Sheets.
team_signing.player_duplicate: There are multiple players with Discord `{discord_name}` in Google Sheets: {locations}. Fix it manually before continuing.

team_signing.remaining_signings_exceeded: There are not enough remaining signings in `{team_name}`. Remaining: {remaining_signings}. Requested: {requested_signings}.

channel_management.match_played_summary: The channel is now read-only for the rest of the roles. Staff, Administrador, and Ceo keep write access.
channel_management.matchday_closed_summary: The channel is now closed for unprotected roles. Only Staff, Administrador, and Ceo keep access.
channel_management.reopen_summary: The channel has been reopened. Write access was restored for the roles that already had access.
channel_management.reopen_with_roles_summary: The channel has been reopened. Write access was restored for the roles that already had access and these roles were added: {roles}.
channel_management.add_roles_summary: These roles were added to the channel: {roles}.

match_channel_creation.created_summary: Created {channel} in `{category}` for matchday {jornada}, match {partido}, between {team_one} and {team_two}, and posted the channel welcome message.

team_signing.role_removal_ambiguous: There are multiple Discord matches for `{discord_name}`. Roles were not removed automatically.
team_signing.role_removal_failed: The Google Sheets removal was applied, but Discord roles could not be removed: {details}.
team_signing.role_assignment_summary: Role assignment: new={assigned_count}, already_set={already_count}, unresolved={unresolved_count}, ambiguous={ambiguous_count}.

team_role_assignment.completed: Role synchronization completed for `{team_name}`: new={assigned_count}, already_set={already_count}, unresolved={unresolved_count}, ambiguous={ambiguous_count}.
